text_block_list.name: Race Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa～!
Did you see that run from Buena Vista…!?

text_block_list.name: Race Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that was incredible…! No wonder
she was the one to watch! She's definitely
heading for the big races next.

text_block_list.name: Race Fan B
text_block_list.text:
But the others were strong too, right?
That didn't feel like a Make Debut race at all…
This might end up being one of those
"legendary" races…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hah… hah…
(Clap, clap, clap…!)

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
—Congratulations on your debuts!
—Buena Vista! We're rooting for you!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much…!
I'll keep doing my best from here on!

text_block_list.name: Unicalize
text_block_list.text: …Buena Vista.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…!
Everyone…

text_block_list.name: Unicalize
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the great race today.
…This is just the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Same to you!
It was really fun, wasn't it?

text_block_list.name: At the Crest
text_block_list.text:
Haha!
You really are something else.

text_block_list.name: At the Crest
text_block_list.text:
So you're heading down the Tiara route,
right? Guess we won't be crossing paths
much for a while, since we're aiming for
the Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Shindou Runrun
text_block_list.text:
Even so… the paths of racers are always
intertwined. If we keep running, we're bound
to meet again someday.

text_block_list.name: Sansha Sangyo
text_block_list.text:
Sansha… Each of us walking our own path,
in our own way… let's all make a name for
ourselves～

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Yes! And then…
Let's race together again someday!

Recognizing each other's strength,
encouraging each other, and setting off
down their own paths… Buena Vista's
beginning was as refreshing as it was bright.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hey, how was it?
My Make Debut!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe.
Yeah, I feel amazing too!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hearing all that applause, seeing all those
smiles…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I bet If I run in even bigger races, I'll see
even more amazing view than I did today.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Buena Vista!
Congratulations on your Make Debut!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
We'd love to get a quick interview!
How are you feeling right now?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Um…
…Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
First of all, I'm just really happy I was able
to debut!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
And hearing everyone cheering for me
already… it really fired me up. I'm ready
to give it everything from here on!

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
That was quite the Make Debut!
Now then, about your future goals…
I hear you've already decided on your path?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Yes!
I'll be going down the Triple Tiara route!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: (Oooh…!)

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
That's exciting to hear! In that case, your
big Junior class goal would be… the
Hanshin Juvenile Fillies, right?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
A Junior class G1 race where the top
contenders for the Tiara route all gather!
Win there, and you're practically guaranteed
to shine in the Classic class too!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
That would be…
Trainer?

Given Buena Vista's ability, we should
challenge a G1 race, no reason to hold back
and "wait and see." From the look on her face,
there seems to be no objection.
choice_data_list: We'll be aiming for the Hanshin JF.

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text:
—Oooh! Just as expected!
—This is going to be exciting!

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
…Alright, I've got one too.
A question for the trainer!

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
You're Buena Vista's… childhood friend,
correct?

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
So then… is it fair to say that your
"closeness" with her played a role in you
getting the job?

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
I'd heard plenty about Buena Vista's talent.
Honestly, I expected a more experienced
trainer to be chosen for her.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Huh, childhood friends, huh…
And a rookie trainer on top of that…
To be honest… it does make you wonder.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
She's a highly anticipated talent.
…You sure you can handle that?

A murmur spreads through the crowd.
They're not wrong, compared to the
expectations placed on her, my track record…
my ability… don't measure up. But…
choice_data_list: …Judge me by what I do from here on.

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
…Alright.
We'll be watching you both.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …You didn't deny it, did you?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
The part about you being chosen because
we're "close." We went through a proper
trial period and chose each other, didn't we?

It's true. Before signing fully, we had a
provisional contract period to evaluate
each other's ability, especially mine. But…
choice_data_list: It's also true, we were childhood friends.
It's also true, we were childhood friends.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: That's… true, but…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Yeah?

"It's also true that I'm not good enough for
you right now" …I swallowed those words.
There's no reason to say them. Because
I have no intention of giving up on her.
choice_data_list: (I'll just have to become worthy of her.)

text_block_list.text:
"It's also true that I'm not good enough for
you right now" …I swallowed those words.
There's no reason to say them. Because
I have no intention of giving up on her.
choice_data_list: (I'll just have to become worthy of her.)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Oh, right!
I should call my mom!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
She came to watch today.
Do you want to come say hi too?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Ah, there she is!
Mooom!

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
It has been.
Have you been doing well?

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You haven't come by lately…
You could visit more often, you know?
I always keep your favorite snacks stocked.

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
…But enough about that. Congratulations
to both of you on your debut!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
We finally took our first step together.
…We'll show you something even greater
next time!

Towards our next target race…
The Hanshin Juvenile Fillies. We'll grow
together, "both of us."
